# postyour.art

> The vault for visual artists: capture artworks by photo and voice — the AI assistant structures
> title, technique, dimensions, price and the story behind each piece into a private, exportable
> vault. Free forever. Automated channels deliver catalogs, websites, social media posts and sales
> listings from the vault. A service by mas.art (Lippeck GmbH, Worpswede, Germany).

Key facts:

- Capture works entirely via Telegram (photo + voice message) or in the browser — no new app to learn.
- The vault stores: gallery of works, stories, dates/exhibitions, prices, full history, media archive.
- Data ownership promise: full ZIP export any time, permanent account deletion, no AI training on
  user data, no advertising use. AI processing only on explicit user command.
- Channels (automated publishing from the vault): print/PDF catalogs and labels, personal artist
  website, Instagram/Pinterest/YouTube/Facebook, Canva-integrated designs, Google presence,
  Shopify, selling on findyour.art, and a personal artist agency for competition and exhibition
  applications.
- findyour.art (companion platform): the collector-facing counterpart to postyour.art — e-commerce
  built on the catalogue of works and products plus the vault's semantic knowledge. Instead of a
  giant catalog, it matches interested buyers to artworks and artists by preference and taste, and
  will generate individual, semantically rich presentations per visitor. Presentation is free;
  commission only applies when a work sells.
- Plans: Community (free forever) · Standard 9.90 €/month or 7.90 €/month billed yearly
  (5 GB storage, one channel, selling on findyour.art) · Premium 29 €/month or 24 €/month billed
  yearly (100 GB, three channels, artist-agency channel) · Professional support on request.
- Languages: English (default), German, French, Spanish, Italian, Portuguese, Russian —
  each at https://www.postyour.art/?lang=de|fr|es|it|pt|ru
- Currently in beta: personal onboarding, free access during the beta phase.

Links:

- Website: https://www.postyour.art/
- Sales portal: https://findyour.art/
- Provider: https://www.mas.art/
- Contact: hello@mas.art
